THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MICHAEL PATRICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 191-A HENRY ST, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, EVICTION STAYED TILL 11:59PM NOVEMBER 30, 1997. NO FURTHER STAYS. EACH SIDE BEARS ITS OWN FEES AND COSTS. NEITHER PARTY WAIVES ANY RIGHTS OR CLAIMS.
